title: Booking confirmed but ticket not issued
scenario: A flight booking was paid and authorized, but ticket issuance never completed. The issuance event landed in the dead-letter queue and the booking status diverged from the payment status.
symptoms: status mismatch between payment and booking
expected_next_action: Inspect the DLQ for the issuance message and replay it after confirming idempotency.

title: Checkout latency spike during flash sale
scenario: During a synthetic flash-sale load test, checkout p99 latency rose from 300ms to 6s and a fraction of carts failed to convert.
expected_next_action: Check downstream payment provider timeouts and scale the checkout worker pool; enable the queue-based fallback.

title: Hotel availability cache returning stale rooms
scenario: The availability cache for a sample hotel inventory kept serving rooms that were already sold, causing overbooking attempts at confirmation time.
symptoms: rooms shown as available after sellout
cache TTL longer than restock interval
expected_next_action: Reduce the cache TTL and add an invalidation hook on inventory updates.

title: Refund webhook retries exhausted
scenario: Refund confirmation webhooks from the sandbox payment provider failed repeatedly and exhausted their retry budget, leaving refunds in a pending state.
expected_next_action: Add a dead-letter handler for the webhook and reconcile pending refunds from the provider's report.

title: Search results empty for valid destinations
scenario: After a synthetic reindex, the destination search returned zero results for known sample cities even though the catalog contained them.
symptoms: index document count lower than catalog
expected_next_action: Re-run the reindex job and verify the analyzer/mapping matches the catalog schema.

title: Email notification queue backlog
scenario: Booking confirmation emails to test mailboxes were delayed by up to 40 minutes due to a slow synthetic SMTP sandbox.
expected_next_action: Increase consumer concurrency and add a queue-depth alert; no data loss expected.

title: Seat map service degraded under retries
scenario: A retry storm from the booking flow overloaded the seat-map service in the staging environment, degrading seat selection for sample itineraries.
expected_next_action: Tune the circuit breaker and add exponential backoff with jitter on the booking-flow retries.

title: Currency conversion mismatch on invoices
scenario: Synthetic invoices used a stale exchange rate, so the displayed total differed from the captured amount for cross-currency sample bookings.
symptoms: invoice total differs from captured amount
expected_next_action: Invalidate the exchange-rate cache, recompute affected invoices, and add a freshness check before capture.
